mapper.select:
SELECT c.status statusSwitch, c.isdefaultpay, p.status, p.class_name FROM lkt_payment_config c inner JOIN lkt_payment p ON c.pid = p.id WHERE c.store_id = #{store_id}
p.class_name = #{class_name}
SELECT config_data FROM lkt_payment_config WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(config_data, '$.pub_key_id')) = #{pub_key_id};
